violations.text: The 2 Door Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair (torn/worn). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The soda gun holder drain was observed to be draining into a sink at the small bar area. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024

The dumpster outside is located on stone. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024

The ceiling in the kitchen area was observed to be missing tiles over the hanging utensil/equipment hanging rack. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. (Per the PIC, tiles are on hand to be cut and place into the area needed.) New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
